Lam.1.5: he has caused grief to her
Lam.2.6: he has caused to be forgotten
Lam.2.8: and he has caused to mourn
Lam.2.16: that we have waited for it
Lam.2.17: and he has caused to rejoice
Lam.2.22: he has made an end of them
Lam.3.4: he has made to waste away
Lam.3.6: he has caused to dwell me
Lam.3.8: and I may cry for help
Lam.3.11: and he has torn in pieces me
Lam.3.12: and he has set up me
Lam.4.21: and you may strip yourself naked
